ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, instructor, learner) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the site was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the site was last updated */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site administrator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Site status (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site hosting the challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for completing the challenge */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the challenge was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the challenge was last updated */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Challenge difficulty level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Challenge category (e.g., penetration testing, secure coding) */,
  "hints" TEXT /* Hints or tips for the challenge */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Solution or explanation for the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user on the site */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the user on the site (as a percentage) */,
  "completed_challenges" INTEGER /* Number of challenges completed by the user on the site */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity on the site */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the site in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "submission_details" TEXT /* Details of the submission (e.g., code, answers) */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned from the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the user for the submission */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Number of attempts the user has made for the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_submissions_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user on the site */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user on the site */,
  "total_challenges" INTEGER /* Total number of challenges completed by the user */,
  "completed_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of challenges completed by the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the leaderboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
